expectedOutput.summary: Processed a valid contamination trace for E. coli O157:H7 involving Romaine Lettuce Hearts 3-pack, traceability lot LOT-2026-0437, with IMMEDIATE urgency and recall class I. Quarantine notifications were attempted for 3 qualifying downstream distributor nodes with usable contact emails. All 3 high-importance emails were sent successfully.

notifications.subject: IMMEDIATE QUARANTINE NOTICE: Romaine Lettuce Hearts 3-pack | Lot LOT-2026-0437 | E. coli O157:H7
notifications.body:
Immediate action required: Quarantine all affected inventory immediately and stop any further distribution, shipment, or sale.

Product: Romaine Lettuce Hearts 3-pack
Description: Fresh romaine hearts, 3-count sleeve, ready-to-eat
Traceability lot code: LOT-2026-0437
Contamination issue: E_coli_O157H7
Urgency: IMMEDIATE
Recall class estimate: I

Shipment details for FreshPack Distribution:
- Units shipped: 4200 EA
- Shipped date: 2026-06-02
- Reference document number: BOL-50021
- Current status: DELIVERED

Grounded event details:
- Production date: 2026-06-01
- Expiry date: 2026-06-12
- Origin facility: Salinas Valley Farm (CA)
- States affected: AZ, CA, TX
- Total units affected: 16100 EA

Laboratory result summary:
- Test type: E_coli_O157H7
- Result: POSITIVE
- Result value: Detected in 25g
- Critical limit: Not detected / 25g
- Test date: 2026-06-08
- COA reference: COA-2026-0437

Required actions:
1. Immediately identify and quarantine all units from lot LOT-2026-0437 in your control.
2. Stop shipment, redistribution, and sale of the affected product.
3. Place any downstream inventory on hold and notify any internal distribution points handling this lot.
4. Confirm back by email that quarantine has been completed and that sale/shipment has ceased.

Please treat this notice as urgent and take immediate containment action.
notifications.reason: Email sent successfully with high importance.
